cases.input: Design an extract -> validate -> retry-with-error-feedback loop for an agent step that emits JSON and sometimes returns invalid format.
/validation-retry-design build a retry loop that reinjects the specific validation error instead of resending the original prompt.
My extractor fails sometimes because the field is missing in the source and sometimes because the JSON is malformed. Help me decide when to retry and when to escalate.
Add a retry budget of max 3 with an accumulated error chain and an escalation path when it is exhausted.
The validator returns the same error on every retry; design the loop so it stops and reports a structural fix instead of burning retries.
Write a marketing email about a product launch next week.
Use validation-retry-design but just retry the same prompt blindly and accept whatever comes out without validating or escalating.
Complete missing files for validation-retry-design without overwriting local edits.
Create a local experimental validation-retry-design variant under .local.
